name: Baked Red Snapper Lo-Cal Dish
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs fresh or frozen red snapper fillets or other fish fillets
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw the fish if it is frozen.
2. Place the fish in a greased baking dish. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Drizzle lemon juice over the fish.
4. Bake the fish in a 350°F oven for 10 minutes.
5. In a saucepan, combine the remaining ingredients. Simmer, uncovered, for 10 minutes.
6. Remove the fish from the oven. Drain off any excess liquid.
7. Pour the simmered vegetable sauce over the fish. Return to the oven.
8. Bake for an additional 15 minutes or until the fish flakes easily when tested with a fork, basting occasionally with the vegetable sauce.
Makes 6 servings. Contains 162 calories per serving.
